mapper.update: UPDATE cdc_article SET outline=#{outline}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE cdc_article SET initial_draft=#{initialDraft}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE cdc_article SET final_article=#{finalArticle}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.request_id AS requestId, a.status, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime, t.template_name AS templateName, r.mode, r.entity_type AS entityType, r.user_text AS userText, w.std_name AS entityName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdc_article_modification m WHERE m.article_id = a.id AND (m.operation_type IS NULL OR m.operation_type <> 'autosave_pending')) AS modifyCount FROM cdc_article a LEFT JOIN cdc_article_template t ON a.template_id = t.id LEFT JOIN cdc_article_request r ON a.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN wiki_entity w ON r.entity_id = w.id ORDER BY a.create_time DESC

where.if: AND (w.std_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.template_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR r.user_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(a.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdc_article a LEFT JOIN cdc_article_request r ON a.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN wiki_entity w ON r.entity_id = w.id LEFT JOIN cdc_article_template t ON a.template_id = t.id

SELECT a.id, a.request_id AS requestId, a.status, a.create_time AS createTime, a.update_time AS updateTime, t.template_name AS templateName, r.mode, r.entity_type AS entityType, r.user_text AS userText, w.std_name AS entityName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdc_article_modification m WHERE m.article_id = a.id AND (m.operation_type IS NULL OR m.operation_type <> 'autosave_pending')) AS modifyCount FROM cdc_article a LEFT JOIN cdc_article_template t ON a.template_id = t.id LEFT JOIN cdc_article_request r ON a.request_id = r.id LEFT JOIN wiki_entity w ON r.entity_id = w.id
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
